mapper.sql: Id, customerid, begintime, endtime, bzqx, payment, peoplecount, paymenttype, havesendmessage, userid, majororganid, organid, status, waitcounts, dt,fapiaotag,pdfurl,outdays,sourceid,version,temptag,customername,productname,customertype, availablefapiaopayment,haveusefapiaopayment
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from tb_policys
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into tb_policys (Id, customerid, begintime, endtime, bzqx, payment, peoplecount, paymenttype, havesendmessage, userid, majororganid, organid, status, waitcounts, dt,sourceid,version,temptag ) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{customerid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{begintime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{endtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{bzqx,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{payment,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{peoplecount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{paymenttype,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{havesendmessage,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{userid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{majororganid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{organid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{waitcounts,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{dt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{sourceid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{version,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{temptag,jdbcType=INTEGER} )

insert into tb_policys
Id,
customerid,
sourceid,
begintime,
endtime,
bzqx,
payment,
peoplecount,
paymenttype,
havesendmessage,
userid,
majororganid,
organid,
status,
waitcounts,
dt,
version,
temptag,
customername,
customertype,
productname,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{customerid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{sourceid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{begintime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{endtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{bzqx,jdbcType=INTEGER},

#{organid,jdbcType=BIGINT},

#{temptag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{customername,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{customertype,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{productname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update tb_policys
Id = #{record.id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
customerid = #{record.customerid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
begintime = #{record.begintime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
endtime = #{record.endtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
bzqx = #{record.bzqx,jdbcType=INTEGER},
payment = #{record.payment,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
peoplecount = #{record.peoplecount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
paymenttype = #{record.paymenttype,jdbcType=INTEGER},
havesendmessage = #{record.havesendmessage,jdbcType=INTEGER},
userid = #{record.userid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
majororganid = #{record.majororganid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
organid = #{record.organid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
status = #{record.status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
waitcounts = #{record.waitcounts,jdbcType=INTEGER},
dt = #{record.dt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},

update tb_policys set Id = #{record.id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, customerid = #{record.customerid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, begintime = #{record.begintime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, endtime = #{record.endtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, bzqx = #{record.bzqx,jdbcType=INTEGER}, payment = #{record.payment,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, peoplecount = #{record.peoplecount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, paymenttype = #{record.paymenttype,jdbcType=INTEGER}, havesendmessage = #{record.havesendmessage,jdbcType=INTEGER}, userid = #{record.userid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, majororganid = #{record.majororganid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, organid = #{record.organid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, status = #{record.status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, waitcounts = #{record.waitcounts,jdbcType=INTEGER}, dt = #{record.dt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}

update tb_policys
customerid = #{customerid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
sourceid = #{sourceid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
begintime = #{begintime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
endtime = #{endtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
bzqx = #{bzqx,jdbcType=INTEGER},
payment = #{payment,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
peoplecount = #{peoplecount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
paymenttype = #{paymenttype,jdbcType=INTEGER},
havesendmessage = #{havesendmessage,jdbcType=INTEGER},
userid = #{userid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
majororganid = #{majororganid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
organid = #{organid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
waitcounts = #{waitcounts,jdbcType=INTEGER},
dt = #{dt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
fapiaotag = #{fapiaotag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
outdays = #{outdays,jdbcType=INTEGER},
pdfurl = #{pdfurl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
version = version+1,
temptag = #{temptag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
productname = #{productname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
customertype = #{customertype,jdbcType=INTEGER},
customername = #{customername,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
availablefapiaopayment = #{availablefapiaopayment,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
haveusefapiaopayment = #{haveusefapiaopayment,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
where Id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER} and version = #{version,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update tb_policys set customerid = #{customerid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, sourceid = #{sourceid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, begintime = #{begintime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, endtime = #{endtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, bzqx = #{bzqx,jdbcType=INTEGER}, payment = #{payment,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, peoplecount = #{peoplecount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, paymenttype = #{paymenttype,jdbcType=INTEGER}, havesendmessage = #{havesendmessage,jdbcType=INTEGER}, userid = #{userid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, majororganid = #{majororganid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, organid = #{organid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, waitcounts = #{waitcounts,jdbcType=INTEGER}, dt = #{dt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, pdfurl = #{pdfurl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, version = version+1, temptag = #{temptag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, availablefapiaopayment = #{availablefapiaopayment,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, haveusefapiaopayment = #{haveusefapiaopayment,jdbcType=DECIMAL} where Id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER} and version=#{version,jdbcType=INTEGER}
